---
title: "About"
description: "Learn about chen.ist, a technology consulting firm specializing in cybersecurity, software development, and cloud infrastructure solutions."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>About <span class="gr">chen.ist</span></h1>
    <p>Technology consulting built on cybersecurity, software development, and cloud infrastructure.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>What drives us</h2>
    <p class="sub">Four values at the core of everything we build.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-trophy"></i><h3>Excellence</h3><p>Solutions that exceed expectations in quality and reliability.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock"></i><h3>Integrity</h3><p>Transparency, honesty, and ethical standards in every interaction.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-lightbulb"></i><h3>Innovation</h3><p>New ideas and emerging technologies explored and applied.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-people"></i><h3>Partnership</h3><p>Lasting relationships built on mutual trust and respect.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img src="/assets/images/stock/team-meeting.jpg" alt="Team collaboration at chen.ist"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Our mission.<br>Your potential.</h2>
        <p>We provide high-quality, secure, and efficient technology solutions that empower organizations to reach their full potential in the digital world. From cybersecurity to cloud infrastructure, every engagement is tailored to your goals.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/services/" class="m-lk">Explore our services</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.jpg" alt="Modern software development"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Built to last.<br>Designed to scale.</h2>
        <p>We take a collaborative, holistic approach: understand your needs, plan precisely, implement with care, test rigorously, and support long-term. Every step is documented, every decision defensible.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-lk">Talk to our team</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Leading digital transformation</h2>
    <p class="sub">We strive to be a technology partner known for excellence, innovation, and security.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>Cybersecurity</h3><p>Blue team operations, threat hunting, and NIS2 compliance.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i><h3>Software Development</h3><p>Full-stack engineering with modern frameworks and CI/CD.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud"></i><h3>Cloud Infrastructure</h3><p>Architecture, migration, and optimization across providers.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i><h3>Consulting</h3><p>Strategic guidance for technology transformation initiatives.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Learn more</h2>
    <p class="sub">Our commitment extends beyond technology.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-heart"></i><h3>Social Responsibility</h3><p>Sustainable practices, community development, and social impact through technology.</p><a href="/about/csr.html" class="m-lk">Our CSR initiatives</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-people-fill"></i><h3>Community</h3><p>Open-source contributions, meetups, mentorship, and educational programs.</p><a href="/about/community.html" class="m-lk">Community involvement</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Ready to work<br>with us?</h2>
    <p>Let's discuss how we can help you achieve your technology goals.</p>
    <a href="/contact.html" class="m-b">Contact us</a>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
